args.code: (() => { const pre = document.querySelector('pre'); if (pre) return pre.innerText.slice(0, 5000); const logs = document.querySelectorAll('.log-line, [class*="log"], .job-log'); if (logs.length) return Array.from(logs).map(l => l.innerText).join('\n').slice(0, 5000); return document.body.innerText.slice(0, 5000); })()
